test_command: pnpm vitest run (789 tests) + pnpm vitest run daily-task*.test.ts (15 tests) + pnpm typecheck
notes: AC-1 PASS: DailyTaskAgent.ts invokeLLM() calls this.llmGateway.complete({model_tier:'lightweight', timeout_ms:30_000, ...}). AC-2 PASS: execute() checks stepCount===0||evolutionProfile===null → buildColdStartTasks() → isFallback:false modelUsed:'cold-start-template'. AC-3 PASS: cron/daily-task-runner.ts schedule('0 0 * * *', ..., {scheduled:false}); index.ts calls dailyTaskCron.start() at boot. AC-4 PASS: runForAllActiveAccounts() does prisma.ipAccount.findMany({where:{isActive:true,updatedAt:{gt:sevenDaysAgo}}}) then forEach enqueue with jobId=daily-task-{id}-{date}. AC-5 PASS: prisma schema has @@unique([accountId, taskDate]); worker uses prisma.dailyTask.upsert({where:{accountId_taskDate:{...}}}). AC-6 PASS: Worker({concurrency:5}); failed event handler + error dead-letter stub registered. AC-7 PASS: dailyTasksRouter.regenerateToday mutation enqueues job; no hard active limit enforced (design intent). AC-8 PASS: 10 unit tests all pass (T1 cold-start/T2 evolutionProfile-null/T3 LLM-lightweight/T4 schema-retry/T5 template-format/T6 cron-regex/T7 fan-out-5/T8 concurrency-5/T9 idempotent-jobId/T10 failed-handler). AC-9 PASS: 3 integration tests pass (3 accounts fan-out/worker upsert chain/idempotent jobId). AC-10 PASS: metadata.eventType='l5_agent' in invokeLLM() call to gateway. AC-11 PASS: pnpm typecheck 0 errors; pnpm vitest 789/789 pass; lint confirmed 0 per developer logs. AC-12 PASS: LJ1+LJ2 both score 5.0/5.0 (15/15 dim checks). Zero-regression: 789/789 vitest pass (exit_code=0). Typecheck: exit_code=0 across all 6 workspace packages.
